Main OLS: Main primary-analysis specification with no additional controls.
Quarter FE: Adds quarter fixed effects to control for seasonal differences.
Add time trend: Adds quarter fixed effects and a linear time trend.
Add commencements: Adds quarter fixed effects and controls for international student commencements.
Drop outliers: Drops observations outside the 5th–95th percentiles of enrolments and vacancy rate.
Log enrolments: Uses log(1 + enrolments) instead of enrolments in levels.
HC3 standard errors: Uses HC3 robust standard errors for the main OLS specification.
